MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED COMPLT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLANUEVA, CHRISTIAN HEARING SET FOR MAR-10-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN VILLANUEVA'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 25, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE KRAMER. JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976. (302)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN VILLANUEVA'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED AS TO INTENTIONAL TORT CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT OWES NO DUTY TO AVOID SPENDING MONEY IN ORDER TO SATISFY A POTENTIAL JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. FURTHER, ALLEGATIONS IN THE PROPOSED NEW TORT CAUSE OF ACTION ARE INSUFFICIENT TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION. AS FOR THE PROPOSED NEW PLAINTIFF AND HER CAUSE OF ACTION FOR LOSS OF CONSORTIUM, DEFENDANT REPRESENTED THAT PLAINTIFF HAS WITHDRAWN THIS REQUEST. THE REPLY DID NOT CONFIRM THIS WITHDRAWAL NOR DID IT DISCUSS THIS NEW PARTY AND CLAIM. IF THE LOSS OF CONSORTIUM CLAIM IS STILL REQUESTED, THEN A HEARING IS REQUIRED. IF NOT, THEN NO HEARING REQUIRED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN VILLANUEVA'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO ADD CAUSES OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND LOSS OF CONSORTIUM IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 24, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 10, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Continued To Aug-04-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff Christian Villanueva'S Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Dean, Esq., 415.576.1600, for plaintiff Christian Villanueva.
Arlen Litman-Cleper, Esq., 415.288.6600, for defendants Sara Pearson and Brent Pearson.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Plaintiff Christian Villanueva's Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint is denied as to intentional tort cause of action. Defendant owes no duty to avoid spending money in order to satisfy a potential judgment in favor of Plaintiff. Further, allegations in the proposed new tort cause of action are insufficient to state a cause of action. As for the proposed new Plaintiff and her cause of action for loss of consortium, Defendant represented that Plaintiff has withdrawn this request. The Reply did not confirm this withdrawal nor did it discuss this new party and claim. If the loss of consortium claim is still requested, then a hearing is required. If not, then no hearing required. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Complt
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court vacated the tentative ruling which was issued in error and continued PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN VILLANUEVA'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Complaint to March 25, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302 to be heard by Judge Kramer. Judge: Richard A. Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Complt
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN VILLANUEVA'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO ADD CAUSES OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND LOSS OF CONSORTIUM is continued to March 24, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 10, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
